conference_talks.title: Documenting APIs
conference_talks.description: Documentation is the API interface to the world. In an ecosystem full of standards and fragmented tooling, how to apply a product lens to API documentation?

conference_talks.title: AI in support teams
conference_talks.description: Exploring how AI can enhance support team workflows and customer experience without losing the human touch.

conference_talks.title: Enterprise knowledge management
conference_talks.description: Strategies for managing knowledge at scale in enterprise environments, making information accessible and actionable.

conference_talks.title: We're capitalists
conference_talks.description: A critical look at the intersection of software craft and economic realities in the tech industry.

conference_talks.title: #NoMeetings at Adidas
conference_talks.description: Corporate talk on #NoMeetings practices and rethinking collaboration for distributed teams at Adidas.

conference_talks.title: #NoMeetings: How to have fewer, more efficient meetings
conference_talks.description: Rethinking collaboration beyond default meeting rituals for distributed teams. Practical strategies to reduce meeting overhead.

conference_talks.title: #NoMeetings
conference_talks.event: LDAC (Lean Agile Delivery & Coaching Network) London
conference_talks.description: Online talk for the London-based Lean Agile Delivery & Coaching Network community on #NoMeetings practices.

conference_talks.title: Haize: Creating an Android architecture that adapts to change
conference_talks.description: Clean Architecture applied to Android development. How to build an architecture that embraces change and postpones technical decisions.

conference_talks.title: DevOps: From the trenches to the boardroom
conference_talks.description: Bridging the gap between technical DevOps practices and organizational leadership.

workshops.title: Great interactions generate great products (Example Mapping Workshop)
workshops.description: Interactive workshop exploring how team dynamics and communication patterns shape product outcomes through Example Mapping technique.

workshops.title: Example Mapping workshop
workshops.description: #NoEstimates practice: collaborative technique for breaking down user stories and discovering examples before development.

workshops.title: BDD, Specification by Example & Cucumber workshop
workshops.description: Two-day workshop co-facilitated with Dani Latorre on Behavior-Driven Development, collaborative specification through examples, and Cucumber automation for a multinational development team.

workshops.title: Visual Thinking Kata breakfast experiment
workshops.description: Experiment combining coding katas with visual thinking techniques to explore different learning approaches.

workshops.title: Good Practices of BDD with Gherkin
workshops.description: Online course on BDD good practices with Gherkin, Cucumber, and Behat.

workshops.title: Mini-games workshop with Processing
workshops.description: Hands-on workshop teaching kids game development fundamentals using Processing. Ran in 2015 and 2016 editions.

workshops.title: Open Space STEAM for teachers
workshops.description: Participated in an open space helping teachers explore STEAM education approaches for children.

workshops.title: #NoMeetings Open Space
workshops.description: Facilitated open space session on #NoMeetings practices at Startup Open Space Zaragoza 2022.

media_podcasts.title: Ni cero, ni uno - #NoMeetings, async work, and remote collaboration
media_podcasts.description: In-depth interview on #NoMeetings philosophy, asynchronous work practices, remote collaboration strategies, and rethinking default meeting culture in distributed teams.

media_podcasts.title: Pymes y Trastos - Gestiona Radio interview
media_podcasts.show: Pymes y Trastos (Gestiona Radio - Onda Aragonesa)
media_podcasts.description: One-hour interview discussing the Coding Stones team origin, Agile and Extreme Programming practices, cooperative-style business philosophy, and approach to working as a small independent team. Co-interviewed with Dani Latorre.

media_podcasts.title: La Rosa de los Vientos - El Buscador: Telegram vs WhatsApp security
media_podcasts.show: La Rosa de los Vientos (Onda Cero)
media_podcasts.description: Radio segment discussing the security features of Telegram versus WhatsApp messaging platforms.

media_podcasts.title: La Rosa de los Vientos - El Buscador: Cookie Law reality
media_podcasts.show: La Rosa de los Vientos (Onda Cero)
media_podcasts.description: Radio segment explaining the new Cookie Law and its implications for websites and users.

community_organizing.title: Agile Aragón
community_organizing.description: Co-organizer of the agile methodologies community in Aragón. Managed internal community operations, shared social media management, and facilitated workshops and activities.

activities.title: Global Day of Code Retreat 2018
activities.description: Facilitated the annual global event focused on practicing software craft through deliberate practice, hosted by Vueling.

activities.title: Friday Dojos
activities.description: Regular open coding dojos organized through Senpai Devs, hosted under the Agile Aragón community.

community_organizing.title: AOS 2023 Jaca
community_organizing.description: Organized the national Agile Open Space 2023 event in Jaca, a self-organized conference bringing together the Spanish agile community.

community_organizing.title: Women TechMakers Zaragoza 2017
community_organizing.description: Mentored speaker for the first Women TechMakers Zaragoza conference, helping prepare and support technical presentations.

community_organizing.title: Senpai Devs
community_organizing.description: Professional mentoring program co-created with Daniel Latorre and Néstor Salceda to improve programming skills. Introduced methodologies and practices including XP, Software Craft, DevOps, Lean Software Development, and TDD. Invited industry professionals to give talks, including Ujúe Agudo from BikoLabs on general topics, Alberto Gualis on TDD, and Daniel Torres Burriel on UX.

community_organizing.title: Jacathon 2014 - Best Innovative Idea Award
community_organizing.description: Won the Best Innovative Idea award at Jacathon 2014 hackathon. Project focused on open data visualization and currently maintained as JodoCoders.

community_organizing.title: QCon London 2017
community_organizing.description: Volunteer crew member helping with the organization of the 2017 QCon London Conference.

community_organizing.title: Zagales Hacklab
community_organizing.description: Collaborator in a community introducing technology to children through hands-on activities and workshops.

activities.title: Minecraft Competition
activities.description: Co-organized and provided server infrastructure for a Minecraft competition led by the children themselves at eTopia.

activities.title: Camel Race event
activities.description: Collaborated in organizing a robotics event for children at eTopia.

community_organizing.title: Hispalinux Aragón
community_organizing.description: Managed the Hispalinux headquarters in the Aragón region, organizing courses and talks about Open Source, and coordinating collaborations with local associations including PHP developer group, OSLUZ, Drupal camp, DotNetters, and Agile Aragón.
